object_detection_pipeline.note: Inference already passes reference test. Pipeline needs: transpose [1,84,8400]->[8400,84], decode boxes cx/cy/w/h->x1/y1/x2/y2, filter by confidence>0.5, NMS

zero_shot_clip.note: Need CLIP ViT-B/32 as ONNX. Reference at references/clip-vit-b32/. Test: cat image + 4 text labels, verify 'a photo of a cat' scores highest (cosine sim 0.2711).
checks: cosine similarity: cat > dog > car > landscape

speech_to_text.note: Need Whisper tiny as ONNX (encoder + decoder). Reference at references/whisper-tiny/. Test: mel spectrogram from test_tone_440hz.wav, verify encoder output shape [1,1500,384].
checks: encoder output matches reference within tolerance

text_generation.note: Need GPT-2 as ONNX. Reference at references/gpt2/. Test: 'The cat sat on the' -> greedy next token = ' floor'.
checks: argmax of logits = token for ' floor'
KV cache produces same output as no-cache (correctness)

text_classification.note: Need DistilBERT-SST2 as ONNX. Reference at references/distilbert-sst2/. Test: 'I love this movie' -> POSITIVE 99.99%.
